forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 86. Southwest wind 7 to 13 mph.

weather_report:
As the night yields gently to dawn, Boston rests in a tranquil embrace of partly cloudy skies and a whisper of warmth, evoking a serene stillness in the balmy air. With the temperature gracefully hovering around a comfortable 62 degrees, the southwest winds carry soft murmurs of promise, providing a gentle lullaby to those who stroll through the quiet streets. The early hours are perfect for quiet contemplation or leisurely walks, offering a serene contrast to the vibrant pulse of city life.

By the time the sun ascends fully, the city will brighten under a canvas of partly sunny skies and a hint of warmth, with temperatures rising to a near inviting 86 degrees. You might find yourself longing for light layers that can be easily removed as the sun dances higher in the sky. Perhaps a simple cotton shirt paired with breathable trousers will suffice, complemented by a new pair of walking shoes ideal for an ambling adventure among the historic cobblestones or a visit to the verdant oasis of a nearby park. The day beckons for leisurely activities; consider a visit to a quaint café, absorbing the local artistry in a gallery, or simply enjoying the subtle vibrancy that a June day in Boston offers, all the while relishing the art of being present in a city that whispers tales of the past, all the while inviting you to write your own.
